title: Check-in begins
message: Check-in begins now.

title: Mentors Meeting
message: Mentors Meeting starts now for sponsors and Meloy staff only.

title: Opening Presentation
message: Opening Presentation starts now.

title: The Dance
message: The Dance starts now. Get to know teammates and mentors.

title: Dinner
message: Dinner is now being served.

title: The Discovery
message: The Discovery starts now: understanding the problem and conducting interviews.

title: 1st Checkpoint
message: 1st Checkpoint starts now. Be ready to explain the problem you are solving, who you have interviewed or still plan to interview, and whether you are identifying the 5 design requirements.

title: Break for the night
message: Break for the night starts now. Rest up and get ready for tomorrow.

title: Breakfast
message: Breakfast is now available.

title: Meloy Fab Lab Opens
message: The Meloy Fab Lab is now open.

title: 2nd Checkpoint
message: 2nd Checkpoint starts now. Be ready with your 5 design requirements, 3 designs considered, visual representation, and prototyping plan.

title: Lunch
message: Lunch is now being served.

title: Presentation Training
message: Presentation Training starts now.

title: The Doing
message: The Doing starts now. It is hands-on work time.

title: Dinner
message: Dinner is now being served.

title: 3rd Checkpoint
message: 3rd Checkpoint starts now. Be ready with your video, prototype, and PowerPoint, and be prepared to discuss what is finished, what you are behind on, any problems you are having, and your team name.

title: Meloy Fab Lab Closes
message: The Meloy Fab Lab is now closed.

title: Break for the night
message: Break for the night starts now. Rest up and get ready for final presentations tomorrow.

title: Breakfast
message: Breakfast is now available.

title: The Deal
message: The Deal starts now. Practice with mentors and others.

title: Return materials and clean up
message: Teams should now return materials and clean up.

title: Lunch
message: Lunch is now being served.

title: PPT submission deadline
message: PowerPoint submissions are due now on a flash drive.

title: TEST
message: TEST

title: Settle into final presentation room
message: Please settle into ZACH 444 now for final presentations.

title: Team Presentations
message: Team Presentations begin now in ZACH 444. Each team has 10 minutes plus 5 minutes for Q and A.

title: Judges Deliberation
message: Judges Deliberation begins now. Students should complete the survey and gather for the group photo on the learning stairs.

title: Awards
message: Awards begin now in ZACH 444.
